objective: Refactor core/channel/contracts into focused contract subfolders while keeping root compatibility facades. Completed topology: interface/ for NavivoxChannel, profile/ for profile contact value types and codec, scopes/ for profile/memory/message scopes, state/ for channel state/entities. Root files are compatibility facades.
completedSlices: Extracted NavivoxProfileContact, NavivoxProfileHealth, NavivoxVoiceCapability into profile/navivox_profile_contact.dart and re-exported from navivox_channel.dart.

Moved profile contact codec implementation into profile/navivox_profile_contact_codec.dart with root facade kept.
Moved profile, memory, and message scope implementations into scopes/ with root facades kept.
Moved NavivoxChannel interface into interface/navivox_channel.dart with root navivox_channel.dart as facade.
Shared-code pass extracted duplicated mic unavailable fallback string into _micUnavailableReason in profile codec.
